title: UV Spy Pen Invisible Ink Security Marker Blue and UV LED Flashlight
description:
Write secret invisible notes anywhere with the Ultraviolet Spy Marker Set! The UV Spy Markers can write invisibly on almost any dry surface, including paper, metal, glass, paint, skin and even currency. The markings will remain invisible until illuminated under an ultraviolet light source. Ideal for marking sensitive notes, personal property, theft detection and covert communications, these pens will come in handy in all sorts of espionage situations. The ink is heat-proof, waterproof and non-toxic, so it's safe for kids. Colors in set: Green & Blue

UV Spy Pen Invisible Ink Security Marker Blue and UV LED Flashlight

Write secret invisible notes anywhere with the Ultraviolet Spy Marker Set!

Key Features

  • Dries clear- totally invisible to the naked eye!
  • Easy to read under ultraviolet light
  • Great for writing secret messages to others in-the-know
  • Invisible Ink - Only Visible Once Exposed to UV Light Source
  • Write on Paper, Metal, Glass, Paint, Skin & Currency

Product Specifications

  • MPN: UVM-BLCMB11-340
  • UPC: 766359459912
  • Color: Blue
  • Size: 2pc Set

These ultraviolet pens are ideal for marking currency or personal property, writing covert "invisible" communications, taking sensitive notes, etc. The markings remain invisible until examined under the ultraviolet light source.

Its 8 ultraviolet LEDs are housed in an aluminum body and produces more ultraviolet light than most ultraviolet incandescent or fluorescent bulbs.
